verdict: An incredibly fun and well-flowing Easy chart that masterfully follows the vocal rhythms, though it contains a couple of tight eighth-note transitions involving jumps that are slightly too demanding for beginners.

issues.problem: The JUMP UR is followed by an eighth-note HOLD D at 68.281. Transitioning from a jump to a hold in just 250ms requires a very rapid weight transfer that is too difficult for an Easy chart.
There is a tap on L followed immediately by a JUMP LR at 75.027 (250ms gap). Executing a jump immediately after an eighth note is too physically demanding for players at this level.
